title: Nelson, Pitt, Fox
content:
To mute and to material things
    New life revolving summer brings;
    The genial call dead Nature hears,
    And in her glory reappears.

title: Rokeby: Canto IV.
content:
I.

title: Sound, Sound The Clarion
content:
Sound, sound the clarion, fill the fife!
    To all the sensual world proclaim,
    One crowded hour of glorious life
    Is worth an age witho

title: Answer
content:
Sound, sound the clarion, fill the fife!

title: The Lady Of The Lake: Canto IV. - The Prophecy
content:
I.

    The rose is sweetest washed with morning

title: The Maid Of Neidpath
content:
O lovers' eyes are sharp to see,
    And lovers' ears in hearing;
    And love in life's extremity
    Can lend an hour of cheering.

content:

title: The Dance of Death
Marmion: A Christmas Poem
content:
Heap on more wood! the wind is chill;
    But let it whistle as it will,
    We'll keep our Christmas merry still.

title: Flora Macivor's Song
content:
There is mist on the mountain, and night on the vale,
    But more dark is the sleep of the sons of the Gael.

title: The Outlaw
content:
O, Brignall banks are wild and fair,
    And Greta woods are green,
    And you may gather garlands there,
    Would grace a summer queen:

title: Coronach
content:
He is gone on the mountain,
    He is lost to the forest,
    Like a summer-dried fountain,
    When our need was the sorest.

content:

content:
I.

title: The Lady Of The Lake: Canto II. - The Island
content:
I.
    At morn the black-cock trims his jetty wing,
    'T is morning prompts the linnet's blithest lay,

title: Twist Ye, Twine Ye
content:
Twist ye, twine ye! even so,
    Mingle shades of joy and woe,
    Hope, and fear, and peace, and strife,
    In the thread of human life.

title: Davie Gellatley's Song
content:
Young men will love thee more fair and more fast;

title: Bonny Dundee
Soldier, Wake
content:
Soldier, wake, the day is peeping,
    Honour ne'er was won in sleeping,
    Never when the sunbeams still
    Lay unreflected on the hill:
